parent._value: [Forest of Patience] Sabitrama and the Mysterious Medicine

0._value: I heard that #p603# in #m10005000# is making a new medicine...

1._value: I ran into #b#p603##k again in front of the #m10005001#, the same one I helped get herbs before. This time, he said he found a place where I can get an important herb that he needed for his new medicine. He asked me if I could go into that forest and grab #b#t4031026##k for him. It was a reddish root split in two... I should remember it well and find the same one once I get to the top. The herb is in the forest owned by #b#p306##k of #m10002000#, whom I visited last time...

2._value: Thankfully I got the herb that #p603# asked me to get, and for that, I got rewarded with a mysterious rock. And from here on out, I don't have to pay #p306# every time I go in the Forest of Patience. From what I hear, that anti-aging medicine #p603# is working on may be what #p306# needed... if I have time, I should go back in there...

0._value: Ohhh, you're the traveler that helped me out a lot the other day! I made the diet medicine with the herbs you got me and made some money... and this time, I'd like to make a different kind of a medicine. What do you think? Do you want to help me out one more time?

Thank you. The place where you can find the mysterious herb is actually the place you've been to before, #m10002000#. I heard someone's accepting an entrance fee at the entrance... you have the mesos to go in, right? This time you'll be going in much deeper than before so be prepared...

1._value: Yes! I'll explain to you about the herb you'll be getting for me. There are similar herbs around so make sure you remember this. The herb you'll need to get is #b#t4031026##k, and the root looks like this #i4031026#. Look carefully and please get the same one as I described for you.

0._value: Really. You look like you can just breeze through there... please come back here when you have time. I'll be waiting for you.
Ohhh... this is IT! With #b#t4031026##k, I can finally make the anti-aging medicine!!! Hahaha, if you ever become old and weak, find me. By then I may have a special medicine for just that!

1._value: Oh, I almost forgot. Since you helped me out, I should thank you for your hard work... #b#t4020109##k is something I found at the very bottom of a valley a long time ago in the middle of a journey. It'll probably help you down the road. I also increased your fame, and from here on out, #p306# may let you in for free. Well, so long...

0._value: You haven't gotten the herb yet. The herb you need to get is #b#t4031026##k. The roots should look like this #i4031026#. Remember it and get it from #p306# in #m10002000#.
